---
title: "Maria Cristall"
---

## Maria Cristall

**Dates:** (1793/4-December 1872)

### Description

aunt of Florence Wilford

### Biography

She lived in Winchester in 1861, at St Cross in 1871; ‘Florence Wilford’s Aunt died on Monday’ (to CR Coleridge 28 Dec 1872) [census]

### Letters

- Letter from Innocents day [28 December 1872]
- Letter from Aug 11th [1871]
- Letter from Feb 20th [1871]
- Letter from May 6th 1868
- Letter from Oct 30th [1865]
- Letter from June 11th [1863]
- Letter from June 26th 1861
- Letter from April 22nd 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
